title: Buildstone Toolkit
description: Expanding the aesthetic capabilities of vanilla redstone!
body:
### DESCRIPTION AND MEDIA WIP

This mod aims to make small additions/tweaks that unlock a massive amount of possibilities!
Wireless block movement with pistons, general and specific wireless player detection, and many more coming in the future!

You can find all the mod's items in the vanilla redstone tab!

Some basic descriptions are available via item tooltips, but tutorials/showcases will be available soon!
